ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment protocol */,
  "experiment_duration" REAL /* Duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  "task" TEXT /* Type of task being performed in the experiment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the experiment belongs to */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study that the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the participant is part of */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has signed a consent form */,
  "payment_details" TEXT /* Payment details for the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who conducted the trial */,
  "trial_nbr" INTEGER /* Trial number in the sequence */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number for the trial */,
  "rt" REAL /* Reaction time in seconds */,
  "soa" REAL /* Stimulus onset asynchrony in seconds */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (True/False) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus used */,
  "choiced_category" TEXT /* Category chosen by the participant */,
  "manipulation" TEXT /* Manipulation type of the trial */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the task */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the trial belongs to */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block that the trial belongs to */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus in seconds */,
  "response_duration" REAL /* Duration of the response in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the stimulus is associated with */,
  "filename" TEXT /* File path of the stimulus image */,
  "mask_filename" TEXT /* File path of the mask image */,
  "type_occl" TEXT /* Type of occlusion applied to the stimulus */,
  "size_occl" TEXT /* Size of the occlusion applied */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the stimulus belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition that the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, video, audio) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stimulus was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "pressed_key" TEXT /* Key pressed by the participant */,
  "correct_key" TEXT /* Correct key for the trial */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the response belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition that the response belongs to */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., key press, rating) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in the experiment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the block belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition that the block belongs to */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of block (e.g., training, test) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "manipulation" TEXT /* Type of manipulation in the trial */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Level of difficulty for the trial */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the condition belongs to */,
  "manipulation_type" TEXT /* Type of manipulation (e.g., occlusion, priming) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study that the access log belongs to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution that the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
